## Checklist

- [ ] Design-system version stated.
- [ ] Figma links included or marked not applicable.
- [ ] App impact described.
- [ ] Screenshots included or marked not applicable.
- [ ] Validation run documented.
- [ ] Accessibility impact reviewed.
- [ ] Risks and deviations documented.
